name: Jane Ira Bloom
abstract: Jane Ira Bloom (born January 12, 1955) is an American jazz soprano saxophonist and composer.

interviews.title: Jane Ira Bloom interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 3, 1998

concerts.label: Lewis Black, Comedian
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Diblasio
about_quotes.evidence: That’s why I was talking about Jane Ira Bloom. She plays a beautiful note on soprano and it’s like that’s it.

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: And Jane Ira Bloom. She’s not a kid, but I mention, she has a new CD called Wing Walker that is so original.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
